## PiWsSandboxMode type

Supported Pi sandbox modes.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type PiWsSandboxMode = 'off' | 'process' | 'system';
```

## Remarks

`process` isolates cwd and environment only. `system` delegates process isolation to an external wrapper command such as `bwrap` or `firejail`<!-- -->.
